ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product. */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product. */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product. */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product. */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category. */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category. */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category. */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute. */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the attribute belongs to. */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property type of the attribute. */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the attribute. */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is currently active. */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the attribute (e.g., internal, external). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attribute was last updated. */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the attribute in the attribute list. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property. */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., Brand, Color). */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the property represents. */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute value (e.g., text, number). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the inventory. */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in inventory. */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory. */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated. */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering the product. */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last checked. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user. */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user. */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user. */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor). */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created. */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in. */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended). */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role. */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the role can do. */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attribute_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record. */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the attribute that was changed. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change. */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made. */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the attribute. */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change was automated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attribute_changes_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("attribute_id") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record. */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that was sold. */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the sale. */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date and time the sale occurred. */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold. */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale. */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase. */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale. */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the sale. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand. */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand. */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand. */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand logo. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the brand was created. */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the brand was last updated. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)
